education.title: Vocational Course in Management and Programming of IT Systems (QNQ/EQF - Level 4)

projects.title: Booking Marketplace
bullets: Built a full-stack booking marketplace monorepo with a NestJS API and a Next.js admin frontend.
Implemented listing and availability-block CRUD, booking lifecycle (pending/confirmed/cancelled/expired), and host operational dashboards with filters.
Ensured booking consistency under concurrency using transactions + pessimistic locking, with asynchronous expiration handled by BullMQ/Redis.

projects.title: Keymeter API
bullets: Developed a multi-tenant backend for event ingestion and analytics.
Implemented RBAC and API keys lifecycle management with strict scoped verification.
Integrated with Redis for rate limiting and daily data tracking aggregation saved in PostgreSQL.

projects.title: VINC
bullets: AI platform that automates capturing and extracting invoices received via corporate email.
Implemented highly reliable background job queues using BullMQ for non-blocking, parallel processing.
Fast backend architecture powered by Supabase and structured data extraction utilizing large language models.

fullstack.headline: Full Stack Developer - Node.js • Laravel • Ruby on Rails • React • Vue
fullstack.summary: Full Stack Developer with experience in end-to-end web application development, acting in both backend and frontend using Node.js, Laravel, Ruby on Rails, React, Vue, and React Native. Focused on REST APIs, integrations, automation, and data-driven systems, with hands-on deployments in AWS and Firebase.
skills: Backend: Node.js (Express), NestJS, Laravel, CakePHP, Ruby on Rails
Frontend: React, Next.js, Vue, React Native, Angular (Basics)

experience.title: W4M - Mid-Level Full Stack Developer
experience.sub: Laravel • Yii • SQL Server • PostgreSQL • Vue
bullets: Optimized backend APIs in Laravel/Yii, reducing latency in critical endpoints by ~40%.
Implemented asynchronous large-volume data imports via Laravel Queues and cron jobs.
Reduced direct calls to external APIs by consolidating data through scheduled imports and database persistence.
Executed data migration from SQL Server to PostgreSQL, adapting existing queries and indexes.
Developed frontend features in Vue to support new internal workflows.

experience.title: The Wave Coworking - Full Stack Developer
experience.sub: Next.js • NestJS • React Native • TypeScript • AWS
bullets: Developed web and mobile platforms for property showcase and management (admin, metrics, and content).
Created an event ticketing system integrating payments via webhooks and automated ticket issuance (PDF) via email.
Implemented event management, check-in validation, premium user access, and promotional codes.
Developed an internal QR code system for validation and operational workflows using TypeScript and NestJS.
Worked as the sole developer, responsible for architecture, implementation, and AWS deployment.

experience.title: HubAtivo - Full Stack Developer Intern
bullets: Developed REST APIs in NestJS for a real estate platform.
Implemented geographic visualization and filters using Leaflet, improving the search experience.
Implemented administrative modules (content and user management) in React integrated with the backend.
Mentored 3 interns in Node.js and frontend fundamentals.

experience.title: Octus Pay - Junior Full Stack Developer
bullets: Developed Laravel backend for an online course platform (user, course, and permission management).
Implemented admin panels and frontend-backend integrations via REST APIs.

experience.title: Smart Cities Lagoa - Full Stack Intern
experience.sub: Python • Tesseract OCR • OpenCV • React Native
bullets: Created an OCR system in Python (Tesseract/OpenCV) for automatic reading of water meters.
Developed a React Native app for field capture and reading registration in the user flow.
Reduced a monthly multi-hour manual process to just a few minutes per reading.

backend.headline: Backend Engineer — Node.js (Express/NestJS) • Laravel / CakePHP • Ruby on Rails
backend.summary: Backend Engineer experienced in Node.js (Express/NestJS), Laravel / CakePHP, and Ruby on Rails, focused on developing REST APIs, integrations, and automation. Experienced with SQL Server, PostgreSQL, MariaDB/MySQL, and MongoDB, alongside Docker and AWS/Firebase deployment. Complementary experience with Vue, React, and React Native when needed.
skills: Backend: Node.js (Express), NestJS, Laravel, CakePHP, Ruby on Rails, REST APIs

bullets: Optimized backend APIs in Laravel/Yii, reducing latency in critical endpoints and improving system stability.
Implemented large-volume asynchronous imports via Laravel Queues + cron jobs, reducing direct calls to external APIs.
Executed SQL Server to PostgreSQL data migration, adapting custom queries and indexes according to product standards.

bullets: Developed a NestJS backend for a ticketing system, integrating global payments via webhooks and automated PDF email issuance.
Implemented event management, premium users, and promo codes, including operational QR code validation routines.
Served as the technical architect responsible for software design and AWS deployment, ensuring a stable, continuous delivery operation.

bullets: Developed REST APIs using NestJS for a real estate platform, integrating logic rules with MongoDB persistence.

experience.title: Octus Pay — Junior Back-End Developer
bullets: Developed a Laravel backend for an online e-learning platform featuring REST endpoints for users, courses, and permissions.
Integrated backend APIs with administrative panels to guarantee data consistency and operational flows.

bullets: Developed a Python OCR system (Tesseract/OpenCV) for reliable, automatic water meter reading, eliminating entry errors.

bullets: Developing custom REST APIs and third-party integrations in Node.js and Ruby on Rails for on-demand projects.
